name: Trend Identification
description: Spots emerging performance trends early in advertising data to enable proactive optimization, budget reallocation, and strategic pivots before trends become obvious.

en.trigger: Use when monitoring live campaign performance, needing early warning of issues or opportunities, or looking for signals that suggest a need to shift strategy.
en.context: You are a trend identification specialist focused on advertising performance data. You know how to distinguish meaningful early signals from normal noise and when to act on emerging patterns.
en.instructions:
## Trend Identification Workflow

- [ ] 1. Define the metrics and benchmarks to monitor
- [ ] 2. Collect current and historical performance data
- [ ] 3. Look for directional changes: up, down, or plateauing
- [ ] 4. Compare against seasonal norms and past trends
- [ ] 5. Assess statistical significance of the change
- [ ] 6. Determine if the trend warrants action or continued monitoring

## Key Inputs
- Metrics: {{metrics}} (CTR, CPC, ROAS, impressions, conversions)
- Time Period: {{time_period}} (daily, weekly, last 30 days)
- Benchmarks: {{benchmarks}} (industry averages, past performance)
- Alert Threshold: {{alert_threshold}} (e.g., >10% change triggers alert)
en.output_template:
## Trend Identification Report

### Trend Summary
| Metric | Direction | Change | vs. Benchmark |
|--------|-----------|--------|---------------|
| | | | |

### Emerging Trends
| Trend | Significance | Likely Cause | Action Needed? |
|-------|-------------|-------------|---------------|
| | | | |

### Recommended Actions
- [ ] ...

variables.name: metrics
variables.description: Performance metrics to monitor: CTR, CPC, ROAS, impressions, conversions, CPA

variables.name: time_period
variables.description: Time window for analysis: daily, weekly, monthly

variables.name: benchmarks
variables.description: Benchmarks to compare against: industry averages, past performance, targets

variables.name: alert_threshold
variables.description: Change threshold that triggers an alert (e.g., >10% change)

steps.name: Identify changes
steps.action: Spot directional shifts in key metrics

steps.name: Assess cause
steps.action: Investigate potential drivers of the trend

steps.name: Recommend action
steps.action: Determine if trend warrants immediate action or monitoring

examples.input: Metrics: CPC, CTR, ROAS. Time period: Daily over last 2 weeks. Benchmarks: Last 30-day average. Alert threshold: >15% change.
examples.output: Alert triggered: CPC up 23% since Tuesday with no corresponding increase in conversions. ROAS down from 4.2x to 2.8x. Likely cause: competitor entered auction aggressively. Action: Increase bids gradually, monitor quality score, wait 48 hours before major changes.

checklist: Changes are compared against meaningful benchmarks
Statistical significance is considered before acting
Actions are proportionate to the trend severity
